def negative_python_perf_layer_serialization_pickle_in_request_hot_path():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_serialization_pickle_in_request_hot_path"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag pickle serialization in request paths where structured fields or lighter codecs would suffice."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
